source.ref: Milk Artist At our Best - FED - SlowFast Ft AdamFX n Martin - HD CosmoFX

display.name: HD CosmoFX
display.author: FED/AdamFX/Martin
display.blurb: Deep space cosmos pulses with psychedelic galactic light.

annotation.technical_notes: The rendering canvas is dominated by a flat, static gray background, indicating a high decay rate and minimal frame feedback. Brief, localized pixel-stretching glitches and custom shape bursts are gated to high-frequency transients in the audio loop. These sudden vertical extrusion artifacts suggest a custom composite shader triggered by beat detection.
